name: migration-lint

metadata.name: migration-lint
metadata.summary: Tool for lint operations in DB migrations SQL

documentation:
# Migration Lint

![ci status](https://github.com/pandadoc/migration-lint/actions/workflows/ci.yml/badge.svg)
![Coverage](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/pandadoc/migration-lint/coverage-badge/coverage.svg)
![Py Version](https://img.shields.io/pypi/pyversions/migration-lint.svg)

`migration-lint` is the modular linter tool designed
to perform checks on database schema migrations
and prevent unsafe operations.

Features:

- Works with [Django migrations](https://docs.djangoproject.com/en/5.1/topics/migrations/),
  [Alembic](https://alembic.sqlalchemy.org/en/latest/) and raw sql files.
- Easily extensible for other frameworks.
- Can identify Backward Incompatible operations
  and check if they are allowed in the current context.
- Can identify "unsafe" operations, e.g. operations that acquire locks
  that can be dangerous for production database.

## Installation

```shell linenums="0"
poetry add "migration-lint"
```

```shell linenums="0"
pip install "migration-lint"
```

## Documentation

Read the docs on [GitHub Pages](https://pandadoc.github.io/migration-lint/)

Migration linter for Django app.

This app has `django` management command
that efficiently handle MRs with many migrations.

classes.name: migration_lint.sql.model.SegmentLocator
migration_lint.sql.model.KeywordLocator
documentation: A locator object used to find segments by keyword.

classes.name: migration_lint.sql.model.ConditionalMatch
documentation:
An object to segment by condition
(for example CREATE TABLE and ALTER TABLE for the same table).
See sql/rules.py for examples.

- `locator` -- what segment to look for.
- `match_by` -- how to match two segments (by table name, column name etc);

classes.name: migration_lint.sql.constants.StatementType
documentation: Types of migration statements.

functions.name: migration_lint.sql.operations.find_matching_segment
documentation:
Find matching segment by the given locator starting with the given
position.

classes.name: migration_lint.extractor.model.Migration
migration_lint.extractor.model.ExtendedSourceDiff

methods.name: migration_lint.extractor.model.ExtendedSourceDiff.of_source_diff
documentation: Create an instance by the given source diff.

An object desribing a single changed file.

- `path` -- the path to the file;
- `old_path` -- the previous path to the file; differs from `path` if the
  file was renamed;
- `diff` -- difference between versions (if present).
- `allowed_with_backward_incompatible` -- is this file is allowed with
  backward-incompatible migrations.
